## Goal

What are you trying to build or verify?

## Public surfaces reviewed

Which public docs or artifacts did you already check?

## Route or schema

Which route, schema, or example file is involved?

## Minimal payload or snippet

If possible, include the smallest public-safe payload or client snippet that shows the question.

## Notes

Add any validator output, contract ambiguity, or docs gap that triggered this question.
